channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Court postpones Medicare24 case to verify Masemola’s finances and evidence from Matlala
item.description: The Pretoria Magistrate’s Court has approved the state’s request to postpone proceedings in the R360 million Medicare24 corruption case to 26 June to allow further investigation. The case involves sen...

item.title: ESPN reportedly opposes expanding the College Football Playoff beyond 16 teams despite conference support
item.description: The College Football Playoff (CFP) is at the center of a debate over potential expansion. After moving from a four-team to a 12-team format, discussions have emerged about further growth. Major confer...

item.title: Life of the O’Hare Family: Liverpool’s Postwar Household with 16 Children
item.description: The O’Hare family of Liverpool gained attention in 1949–1950 as one of Britain’s largest postwar families. Henry O’Hare, an upholsterer, and his wife Marjorie lived in a four-story house in Anfield an...

item.title: Remembering Luciana Paluzzi, Iconic Actress and Bond Villain
item.description: Luciana Paluzzi, born in Rome, Italy, is best remembered for her striking role as Fiona Volpe in the 1965 James Bond classic, Thunderball. Originally auditioning for the lead role of Domino, Paluzzi i...

item.title: Russia escalates daytime drone attacks on Ukraine amid ongoing conflict and diplomatic efforts
item.description: On 13 May 2026, Russia launched a significant daytime drone assault on Ukraine, deploying over 200 Shahed-type drones. Air raid alerts were sounded across multiple regions, including Kyiv, with explos...

item.title: Brett Ratner joins Trump’s official delegation to China, drawing criticism
item.description: During President Donald Trump's diplomatic trip to China on May 14, 2026, Brett Ratner, a film director known for the 'Melania' documentary on Amazon, unexpectedly accompanied the official U.S. delega...

item.title: Senator Bato Dela Rosa Leaves Senate Premises After Gunfire Incident
item.description: Senator Ronald “Bato” Dela Rosa, previously implicated by the International Criminal Court as a suspect in alleged human rights violations during former President Rodrigo Duterte’s anti-drug campaign,...

item.title: Guantanamo Bay Holds Only Six Migrants Despite Trump’s 30,000 Target
item.description: Over a year ago, former President Donald Trump announced plans to detain 30,000 migrants at the Guantanamo Bay military base in Cuba, describing them as the 'worst criminal illegal aliens' threatening...

item.title: SOLAI Introduces $399 Solode Neo Linux Mini PC for Lightweight AI Tasks
item.description: SOLAI has introduced the Solode Neo, a compact Linux-based mini PC priced at $399, designed for low-power AI and automation tasks. The device features an Intel N150 processor, 12GB of LPDDR5 memory, 1...

item.title: Women Face Financial Hardship After Partners’ Abusive Debt
item.description: Many women are finding themselves in dire financial situations due to debts accumulated by abusive partners. These women, often trapped in cycles of financial and emotional abuse, are increasingly tur...

item.title: ANC Councillors Call for SIU Probe Amid Service Delivery Collapse in Emfuleni
item.description: Sixteen ANC councillors from the Vaal municipalities of Emfuleni, Sedibeng, and Lesedi publicly broke ranks with their party, admitting that service delivery in the region has collapsed. In an unsanct...

item.title: Tanzania Economic Growth in March 2026 Driven by Exports, Gold, Manufacturing, and Tourism
item.description: In March 2026, Tanzania showed strong economic performance across several sectors. Exports increased by 12.8%, with gold production jumping 38.5%, reflecting the country's robust mining industry. Manu...

item.title: Local families disrupted by notorious gangsters in suburban Banks
item.description: Westerdale Drive in the village of Banks has long been considered a peaceful suburban area, attracting families from Liverpool and Manchester seeking a quieter life. However, the arrival of two feared...

item.title: Claudia Cardinale Captured by Graziano Arici in 1958 Portraits
item.description: In 1958, Italian Tunisian actress Claudia Cardinale, then 19 years old, was photographed by Graziano Arici in a series of portraits that highlighted her youthful elegance and emerging stardom. Having ...

item.title: Orlando Pirates on Verge of Ending Sundowns’ Eight-Year League Dominance
item.description: South African football supporters may witness the end of an era as Mamelodi Sundowns' eight-year hold on the domestic league appears to be coming to a close. Following Sundowns' 3-2 defeat to TS Galax...

item.title: Vice President Vance Comments on Trump's Iran War Statements Amid Nuclear Concerns
item.description: During a May 13, 2026 press conference, U.S. Vice President JD Vance addressed reporters' questions about President Donald Trump's remarks on the financial impact of the ongoing war in Iran. A reporte...

item.title: Notion Launches Developer Platform to Integrate AI Agents and Workflows
item.description: Notion, the productivity software known for its collaborative note-taking app, is expanding into AI-driven automation with the launch of its Developer Platform. The new platform enhances Notion's exis...

item.title: Canada Considers Cities to Host New International Defence Security and Resilience Bank
item.description: The Canadian government is preparing to host the headquarters of a new international financial institution, the Defence Security and Resilience Bank (DSRB), which aims to provide low-interest loans to...

item.title: Fashion Highlights from the 2026 Cannes Film Festival Red Carpet
item.description: The 2026 Cannes Film Festival showcased not only cinematic brilliance but also a spectacular display of fashion, making the red carpet a hot topic for style enthusiasts worldwide. Attendees brought a ...

item.title: How Rising Gas Prices Are Impacting Low-Income Residents in Pennsylvania
item.description: Rising gas prices in Pennsylvania are disproportionately affecting low-income and rural residents, who often face tough choices between fueling their vehicles and meeting other essential needs, like g...
